description: In this session from Breakpoint 2023, Dan Albert leads a discussion on becoming a validator in the Solana ecosystem, featuring insights from Michael, Luke Spruder, and Johnny. They share their backgrounds, motivations, and the technical aspects of running validators, including challenges like on-chain costs and transaction fees [t=328:88].
topic_summary: The panel discusses the journey to becoming a validator on Solana, addressing technical challenges, motivations for participation, and the financial implications of running a validator [t=67:20].
